name: Pastel Research
tagline: Formal modern medical research deck rebuilt into a 28-slide source-inspired sequence with serif publication hierarchy, pastel scientific diagrams, study methods, results, discussion, references, and closing pages.

palette.description: Soft grey paper with black formal type and pastel cyan, rose, and yellow scientific panels.

typography.style: Formal publication-like serif display with clean modern medical body copy and outlined title variants.

best_for: Research breakthroughs, academic talks, medical science updates, clinical conference decks, and evidence-led science explainers.
avoid_for: High-energy commercial launches, dark product pitches, casual portfolios, or dense operational dashboards.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Formal and Modern Hepatitis Breakthrough
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview structure: formal medical serif typography, pastel abstract scientific fields, background/objective, method, cohort, protocol, results, charts, comparison tables, discussion, recommendations, authors, references, and closing pages. It does not reuse source presentation assets.
